evals.prompt: Create a form for collecting customer contact information (name, email, phone, address)
evals.expected_output: Valid Camunda Forms JSON with textfield components for name, email, phone, and address fields
expectations: Output is valid JSON with .form-compatible structure
Contains components for name, email, phone, and address
Each input component has type, id, key, label, and layout properties
Email field has a regex pattern validation
Name field has required validation set to true
Layout uses sequential row identifiers for logical grouping
Include metadata: executionPlatform, executionPlatformVersion, schemaVersion 18, exporter, id, type

evals.prompt: Create an approval form that shows a comments field only when decision is rejected
evals.expected_output: Valid Camunda Forms JSON with a radio or select for the decision and a conditionally visible comments textarea
expectations: Contains a radio or select component for the approval decision with at least approved and rejected options
Contains a textarea component for comments
The comments field has a conditional.hide property using a FEEL expression
The FEEL expression hides comments when the decision is not rejected
The decision field has required validation
Include metadata: executionPlatform, executionPlatformVersion, schemaVersion 18, exporter, id, type

evals.prompt: Create a form with a dropdown populated from a process variable called departments
evals.expected_output: Valid Camunda Forms JSON with a select component using valuesExpression bound to the departments variable
expectations: Contains a select component with valuesExpression set to "=departments"
Does not use a static values array on the select
The select component has key, label, id, and layout properties
Include metadata: executionPlatform, executionPlatformVersion, schemaVersion 18, exporter, id, type
